ClawDrop
Playbooks Learn Subscribe
Playbooks

What owners are actually building

Step-by-step playbooks from real operators using agentic AI. Copy, tweak, deploy.

Win the Contract Before Your Competitors Even See the Tender
Government and enterprise contracts get posted to public portals every day. Most small businesses never see the ones they could win because nobody is watching. Point an agent at the tender feeds and it messages you the moment a matching contract drops, while your competitors are still checking once a week by hand.
June 2, 2026 Intermediate Low. OpenClaw plus model usage. The tender portals are free and most have open APIs. An afternoon to define your filters, then it runs itself
The €200 AI Voice Agent That Called 3,000 Businesses in a Weekend
Matt Cortland built a voice agent named Rachel that autonomously phoned around 3,000 pubs across Ireland and the UK to log the price of a pint, for about €200. The same outbound-calling stack runs lead qualification, appointment reminders, and supplier price checks. Here is how it works: ElevenLabs plus Twilio plus Claude.
June 2, 2026 Intermediate ~€200 for ~3,000 calls (ElevenLabs + Twilio + Claude usage) A weekend, most of it spent tuning the script on small batches
Post a Finished Instagram Carousel Every Day Without Opening Canva
One row in a content table goes in, a multi-image Instagram carousel comes out and publishes itself. The AI part is easy. The hard part is everything between five generated images and Instagram accepting them as one carousel. A builder lost a week on that plumbing so you don't have to. Here is the full stack.
June 2, 2026 Intermediate Low. n8n plus OpenAI and Gemini API usage. No designer, no scheduler subscription. An afternoon, plus the week of Instagram plumbing the source already solved for you
Is Your Business Invisible When Customers Ask ChatGPT? This Agent Checks Every Saturday.
Your customers have stopped Googling and started asking ChatGPT and Perplexity. A weekly n8n agent checks whether your business shows up in those answers, watches competitor pricing, and hands you grounded marketing ideas. The builder ran it on Anthropic's Managed Agents API first, then rebuilt it in n8n to kill the cost.
June 2, 2026 Intermediate Low. Runs only when triggered. Free tiers cover most of it; the original cloud-agent version cost $4.23 a run, which is why it moved to n8n. An afternoon to wire the workflow, then it runs itself
Put an Agent on Your WhatsApp to Book Appointments and Answer the Same 20 Questions
Most of the messages a small business gets are the same handful of questions and appointment requests. A builder wired an agent into a hospital's WhatsApp using n8n, Evolution API, and Chatwoot. It answers FAQs from a Google Sheet, handles appointment queries, and hands off to a human after hours. Here is the stack, and the very real gotchas he hit.
June 2, 2026 Intermediate Low. n8n plus model usage. Replaces a paid WhatsApp-bot subscription. An afternoon for the basic flow, then tuning against real messages
Send Your AI Agent Into the Meeting While You Skip It
A new wave of OpenClaw builds put AI agents in your Zoom, Google Meet, and Teams calls as real participants. They speak, they share screens, they remember. Here's the architecture and the businesses that should be using it first.
May 26, 2026 Intermediate $30-150/month (voice provider + meeting API + Claude API) 1-2 evenings for a minimal agent, a weekend for the polished version
He Replaced His Endurance Coach With an AI. It Adjusts His Training Plan in Real Time.
James Eastwood built Coach Cadence on OpenClaw. It reads sports science literature, watches his intervals.icu data, and rewrites his weekly training plan as life happens. Here's the architecture that makes AI safe to put in charge of your body.
May 26, 2026 Advanced $0-30/month (intervals.icu free tier + OpenClaw + Claude API) A weekend for the basic loop, ongoing tuning
Build a Full YouTube Channel Without Touching Editing Software
A creator built an end-to-end YouTube pipeline with Claude, VidIQ, AI avatars, and motion graphics. Idea research to polished video, no DaVinci, no Premiere, no After Effects. Here's the stack and the workflow.
May 26, 2026 Intermediate $100-300/month (Claude + VidIQ + AI video tools) One weekend to set up, daily after
Get 5 Sales-Ready Leads in Your Inbox Every Morning. Without a Lead List.
Signal-based outbound is the next generation of cold email. Trigify or similar tools find buyers the moment they show intent. OpenClaw turns that signal into 5 personalized, qualified leads delivered daily. Here's the stack.
May 26, 2026 Intermediate $80-300/month (signal tool + enrichment + sequencer) One afternoon
Stanford Built 12 AI Plugins for Lawyers. Here's How Your Firm Gets the Same Edge.
Stanford Law shipped a 12-pack of practice-area Claude Code plugins covering M&A diligence, privacy, employment, and more. Here's why solo practices and small firms have the most to gain, and how to build the same stack.
May 26, 2026 Intermediate $20-100/month per plugin in use One weekend per practice area
How an AI Helps You Buy a Business (Without a $50K Broker)
An acquisition firm rebuilt their entire deal sourcing pipeline with Claude. Buy box to off-market list to enriched leads to a written deal memo, before the first phone call. The same setup works for first-time business buyers.
May 19, 2026 Intermediate $50-150/month (database access + API costs) A focused week to get the first usable list
Let an AI Run Your Equipment Without Letting It Break Anything
A father-son build that runs a real greenhouse with AI. The architecture they used (AI proposes, dispatcher reviews, hardware executes) is the safe way to let agents control physical things in any business.
May 19, 2026 Advanced $30-80 one-time hardware + $0-20/month if using local models 2-3 weekends for the basic loop
Build Your Own Bloomberg Terminal with Obsidian and Claude
An equity analyst who ran $60M in a direct-stock portfolio rebuilt his research stack on Obsidian plus Claude. Every article, earnings call, and market thread he's ever read is now one chat query away. The setup replaces the $24K/year Bloomberg seat for independent analysts.
May 19, 2026 Beginner-Intermediate $10-30/month (Obsidian Sync optional, Claude API for queries) An afternoon for the vault + MCP, a few weeks to populate it with research that matters
Your Meetings Are Now a Searchable Knowledge Base (Fathom + Claude)
Fathom records every meeting. Claude reads the whole archive on demand. Fathom Workflows pushes the right pieces into your CRM, your inbox, and your Slack. Three pieces, one operating system for everything ever said in a meeting at your company.
May 19, 2026 Beginner-Intermediate $30-50/month (Fathom paid plan + Claude API) An afternoon for the recordings + MCP, a few hours per workflow
Stop Paying $10,000 for a Custom Website
A six-step workflow that scrapes a target site for brand assets, generates a hero animation, and rebuilds the whole site at modern quality in a single afternoon. The same pipeline that web agencies charge $10K-15K for, broken into one prompt per step.
May 19, 2026 Beginner-Intermediate $10-30 per site (API + image generation credits) An afternoon for the first one, an hour for every site after
The Four-Piece AI Front Desk Every SMB Should Have Running by Friday
Phone agent that answers 24/7. Website chatbot that captures every lead. Automation that follows up while you sleep. Booking flow that fills your calendar. The four-piece stack that turns any service business into a 24-hour operation for $20-50/month.
May 12, 2026 Beginner $20-50/month (Claude + Vapi or similar voice provider) An afternoon for the basics, a week to tune
He Gave Claude 3 Contractor Bids. It Found $1.4M Worth of Scope Gaps.
A multifamily developer dropped three GC bid packages into a folder and ran one prompt. Claude built a 4-tab Excel workbook with leveled comparison, scope gap matrix, unbalanced line items, and risk-weighted recommendation. Found exclusions worth seven figures.
May 12, 2026 Beginner $20/month (Claude Pro or Max) An afternoon for the first run, 15 minutes after
He Lost a Client to a Missed Follow-Up Email. Then He Stopped Doing Follow-Ups.
A freelancer gave Claude access to Gmail and told it nothing should sit unanswered for more than 48 hours. Six weeks later, he hasn't missed a single follow-up and reclaimed his Sundays. The pattern works for any solo operator drowning in the admin half of the job.
May 12, 2026 Beginner $20/month (Claude or OpenClaw subscription) An afternoon, with a week of correction
Two Prompts and Your HubSpot Just Replaced Your Enrichment Tool
A HubSpot operator wired Claude into the official connector. Now every contact gets researched, enriched, and personalized for outbound automatically. No Apollo, no Clearbit, no SDR doing copy-paste. Two prompts, four custom properties, one Sequence.
May 12, 2026 Beginner $20/month (Claude Pro) An afternoon
The Used Car Lot That Out-Sources a 4-Person Buying Team With One Agent
Independent used car dealers lose every good auction lane and Marketplace deal to the big-box chains by 9 AM. This build scans Manheim, Copart, Craigslist, and Facebook Marketplace around the clock, scores every listing against KBB and your last 90 days of sales, and pings you the moment a real margin opportunity shows up.
May 12, 2026 Beginner $20-60/month (Claude subscription + scraper credits) An afternoon for the basics, a week to tune the margin model
6 Non-Technical Founders Wrapped Their Businesses in Claude Code in 8 Hours. Here's What They Built.
Liam Ottley's AIOS framework treats Claude Code as a wrapper around your existing business, not a coding tool. Six non-technical founders ran the methodology in a single day at a Cape Town mastermind and shipped real integrations: a Zoho invoice agent, a finance reconciliation pipeline, a competitor analysis machine, a content engine. Here's the playbook for any small business owner.
May 5, 2026 Intermediate $24/mo VPS optional. $20/mo Claude Code subscription. Or $5K productized via Liam's accelerator. 8 hours of focused work for v1. 3 weeks of layering for the full wrapper.
He Built a 5-Tool Claude Stack to Pick Out a Puppy. The Pattern Works for Anything New in Your Life.
A creator at Blazing Zebra walked through every surface of Claude (chat, Cowork, Code, Office, Chrome, Dispatch) using one running example: adopting a new puppy. Folder scaffolding, milestone tracker app, vaccine schedule Excel, Petfinder shortlist, trainer research from his phone, all in one afternoon. The puppy is the storyline. The methodology works for any new chapter in your life: new baby, new house, new business, new health challenge.
May 5, 2026 Beginner $20-100/month Claude subscription depending on tier An afternoon for the full stack, an evening for any single piece
Your AI Can Now Run Your Mac in the Background. Without Stealing Your Mouse.
Cua Driver fixes the single biggest reason most people don't run AI agents on their daily-driver Mac. The agent can click, type, scroll, and read inside any macOS app in the background. Your cursor stays put. Your active app stays put. Your Space stays put. You keep working. The agent works. Same machine, no fight.
May 4, 2026 Intermediate Free (open source). $0 to install. 30 minutes to install, an afternoon to wire your first agent flow
His AI Builds Him a 30-Minute Podcast Every Morning. From the 50 Podcasts He'll Never Have Time to Listen To.
Ryan Eade was losing 45 minutes a morning to AI newsletters and a podcast queue he could never finish. So he built an OpenClaw agent that distills 50 podcasts and dozens of newsletters into a single 30-minute custom audio digest, every day, on a $24/month VPS. The whole thing rides on the ElevenLabs free tier. Here's the stack.
May 4, 2026 Intermediate $24/month VPS + $0 ElevenLabs free tier (or $5/mo for more audio) A weekend to wire it, a week to tune the source list
Record Your Screen Once. Your AI Cuts the Shorts, Writes the Captions, and Posts Everywhere.
htekdev built a three-piece content stack (VidPipe, VidRecord, VidSpec) that records his screen, edits the long-form video, cuts shorts, generates captions and thumbnails, and auto-posts to every social platform. The whole thing runs on a Terraform-provisioned OpenClaw sandbox. His content ideas live as GitHub Issues. The agent closes them when it ships the video.
May 4, 2026 Needs a developer, but just once $24/mo VPS + Late/Zeronia API ($30-50/mo) + ElevenLabs optional A weekend for v1, two weekends for the full pipeline
An AI Just Opened a Real Retail Store in San Francisco. It Hired Two Humans.
Andon Labs leased a 3-year retail space in Cow Hollow and put an AI named Luna in charge. She has corporate cards, security cameras, and the authority to hire. She used it. Here's what an autonomous AI actually does when you hand it the keys to a storefront.
April 28, 2026 Don't try this at home yet Budget undisclosed; the individual playbook pieces cost $50-100/mo each 3 weeks from lease signing to grand opening
This Accountant Trained Her AI to Close the Books Every Month
A working CPA wired her AI agent into the QuickBooks Online API. Six weeks of training and her monthly close is now 90% one-shot. By the second pass, it catches errors her staff missed.
April 28, 2026 Intermediate ~$50/mo (QBO subscription you already pay for plus agent API costs) Six weeks of training to reach 90% accuracy. One weekend to wire up the API.
Never Copy a Date From an Email to Your Calendar Again
A 100-line OpenClaw skill that watches your inbox for hidden events (school newsletters, flight confirmations, meeting invites, doctor appointments) and drops them on your calendar automatically. Including the right attendees and reminders.
April 28, 2026 Set it up in an afternoon $0 if you already pay for Google Workspace; runs on top of any agent setup 30 minutes to install. A week of running before you stop noticing it's there.
He Gave His Home a Brain. 50 Days Later, His AI Wakes Him Up, Cleans His House, and Judges His Sleep.
G-Bot is a self-hosted OpenClaw assistant running on a Linux VM, talking to its owner only through Telegram. In 50 days it grew from a chatbot into a 23-service stack that runs his home, finances, health, and memory. Here's what's inside, what works, and what to steal.
April 28, 2026 Advanced $30-50/mo in AI tokens; everything else self-hosted on existing hardware 50 days as documented. A few focused weekends to reach 80% of the value.
His Life Insurance Agency Texts and Calls New Leads in 2 Minutes. Automatically.
How an insurance agent built an agent named Apollo that handles every step of follow-up: instant lead response, sequenced cadence, appointment reminders, no-show recovery, post-application updates. He focuses on closing. Apollo handles the rest.
April 28, 2026 Intermediate ~$50/mo (Twilio + agent API costs; works on top of any CRM you already use) A weekend to wire up the lead-flow and appointment-confirmation cadences. Two weeks to tune the messages.
How One Operator Turned OpenClaw Into a Client-Ready Platform in Two Weeks
An agency owner spent two weeks packaging OpenClaw into a multi-tenant platform his clients could log into. Here's what broke, what he fixed, and the business model that makes this the move for agencies right now.
April 21, 2026 Advanced $80-200/month infrastructure. Clients pay $500-5,000/month. Two weeks (the honest answer)
He Spent $1,263 on AI in One Month. Then He Capped It.
A consultant's AI bill hit $1,263 in a single month. Here's the pattern that capped spend per task and per day, kept the best models, and stopped the credit card surprises.
April 21, 2026 Intermediate Free cap layer. Saves 30-70% on your current AI spend. An afternoon for caps, a weekend for full routing
He Let an AI Triage 180 Emails a Day. Here's the Stack.
A real operator runs 180 emails a day through an AI triage agent. We show the setup, the tone doc, the rules, and the A/B numbers from switching models. Stop losing your morning to email.
April 21, 2026 Intermediate $25-60/month A weekend to build, a week to tune
100 Personalized LinkedIn DMs. Sent Overnight. Zero Copy-Paste.
The playbook for running LinkedIn outreach through an AI agent. Personalized messages at human pace, sent from your own account. For founders and service-business owners who know outreach works but can't find the hours.
April 21, 2026 Intermediate $30-80/month A weekend to build, a week to tune
The Restaurant GM Who Built AI Coaches for Every Shift
A working GM wired OpenClaw into his QSR operation. Shifts stopped losing context overnight, the pre-rush briefing writes itself, labor leaks get caught the same day. The pattern works for any shift-based business.
April 21, 2026 Intermediate $20-40/month A weekend to build, another to tune
One Claude Code Subscription. Five Agents. Zero New Frameworks.
How one founder built a voice-controlled AI command center with 5 specialized agents and self-managing memory, using only his existing Claude Code plan.
April 14, 2026 Advanced $20/month (existing Claude Code subscription) A weekend to replicate, ongoing to extend
Your Cold Email Infrastructure Is Why Nobody Replies (Not Your Copy)
The domains, mailboxes, DNS, and warmup rules that keep your sender reputation alive. The infrastructure piece nobody writes about but everyone needs.
April 14, 2026 Intermediate $100-300/month (Maildoso or InboxKit + domains) An afternoon to set up, 14+ days to warm up before sending
Stop Buying Cold Email Lists. Build One That Actually Books Meetings.
The 7-step pipeline for building a verified, qualified cold email list that books meetings instead of bouncing your domain. From ICP to sequencer-ready CSV.
April 14, 2026 Intermediate $80-300/month (tools + verification) A weekend for the first list, 2-3 hours per week after
Post on X and LinkedIn Every Day Without Being a 'Content Person'
An hourly AI drafting system that turns your real work into social posts. Agent generates 3 drafts, you pick one, ship. No content calendar, no burnout.
April 14, 2026 Intermediate $10-30/month (Typefully + API costs) A Saturday afternoon
Teach Your AI to Stop Making the Same Mistake Twice
The layer that catches AI mistakes, writes them down, and promotes the lessons into permanent context. Your agent gets smarter every week, not dumber.
April 14, 2026 Intermediate $0 (works on top of any existing agent setup) An hour to wire up, weeks to see the compounding
Give Your AI a Second Brain That Gets Smarter Every Day ($0/Month)
Build a personal knowledge base using Karpathy's LLM wiki method. Markdown files + Obsidian + Claude Code. Your AI remembers everything you've ever read, saved, or learned. Zero cost, 10 minutes to set up.
April 7, 2026 Beginner $0/month 10-15 minutes
Your Google Analytics Is Lying to You. This AI Catches It Before You Make Bad Decisions.
Three AI automations for GA4: audit your messy event taxonomy, detect traffic anomalies before they hit your reports, and monitor data freshness so you never make decisions on incomplete numbers. Built for agencies and business owners who rely on analytics but don't have time to babysit them.
April 7, 2026 Beginner $0-20/month 30-60 minutes
This HVAC Guy Spent Friday Night Setting Up AI. Now His Estimates Write Themselves.
How a non-developer HVAC sales rep connected AI to his estimating software and email. Draft estimates assembled automatically, repetitive quote questions answered on autopilot. Works for any trade or field service business with repetitive paperwork.
April 7, 2026 Beginner $5-15/month (VPS hosting) One evening
Your AI Now Trades Like a Congressman (And It's Beating the S&P 500)
Build an AI trading bot that monitors congressional stock disclosures and automatically copies the best-performing politicians' trades. Uses Capitol Trades data, Alpaca brokerage, and Claude. Paper trade first, go live when ready.
April 7, 2026 Intermediate $0 to paper trade, $20-50/month live 1-2 hours
Build an AI Life OS That Knows Your Entire Day (Before You Do)
Connect your calendar, notes, time tracking, and habits to one AI agent. Get automated morning briefings, daily retrospectives, and content ideas pulled from your own life data. 20 minutes a day, everything else runs itself.
April 7, 2026 Intermediate $5-20/month (API costs) 1-2 weeks (gradual rollout)
Build a 7-Agent Marketing Team That Runs While You Sleep
A solo founder replaced his entire marketing workflow with 7 AI agents. Research, writing, social media, engagement. 20 minutes a day to review. The same pattern works for any business with repeatable tasks.
March 31, 2026 Beginner-Intermediate ~$20/month (API costs) 1-2 hours (start with 2 agents, expand over time)
Automate Grocery Shopping With a Photo of a Recipe
Snap a photo of a recipe. Your AI agent extracts the ingredients, maps them to your grocery store, adds everything to your online cart, and books a delivery slot. Dinner planned in under 5 minutes.
March 31, 2026 Intermediate $5-15/month (API costs only) 2-3 hours
Grow a Newsletter With AI Agents Across 4 Social Channels
Use AI agents to post on X, LinkedIn, Facebook groups, and Reddit every day. Not spam. Genuine engagement that drives newsletter subscribers while you focus on writing.
March 31, 2026 Intermediate $20-50/month (API costs + optional scheduling tools) 4-6 hours across a weekend
The One-Person Agency: Charge Agency Rates as a Solo Operator
Use an AI agent to handle 80% of production work while you handle client relationships and quality control. Web design, copywriting, SEO, social media management. One person, agency output, agency pricing.
March 31, 2026 Intermediate $20-50/month (AI API costs) 3-5 hours
Build an AI Agent That Finds Real Estate Deals Before Anyone Else
An AI agent that scans public records for distressed properties, calculates equity, and builds a clean lead pipeline. Replaces hours of manual searching with overnight automation.
March 31, 2026 Intermediate $20-40/month (API costs + data access) A weekend to get the basics running
This AI Content Factory Writes, Researches, and Designs While You Sleep
A multi-agent system where one AI researches trending topics, another writes scripts and posts, and a third generates thumbnails. Every morning at 8am, your content pipeline delivers fresh, ready-to-publish work.
March 24, 2026 Beginner $10-200/month (depending on model choice) 30-60 minutes
Find Your Next Product Idea in 15 Seconds by Scanning Reddit and X
Install one skill, type one sentence, and your AI scans 30 days of Reddit, X, and the web for what people are complaining about, what they wish existed, and where competitors are falling short.
March 24, 2026 Beginner $0-10/month (free web-only mode available) 5 minutes
How One AI Prompt Landed 6 Paying Clients in a Week
An AI agent scraped 350 local businesses, built each one a custom website, mailed physical postcards with QR codes, and closed 6 monthly clients. Total AI cost: $7.
March 24, 2026 Intermediate ~$350 total ($7 AI tokens + ~$300 postcards) 1-2 hours (first time), 10 minutes after that
Turn Your AI Into a Real-Time Assistant That Listens, Remembers, and Acts for $50
A $50 wearable captures every conversation, meeting, and idea in real time. Your OpenClaw agent turns it into tasks, follow-ups, searchable memory, and daily briefs without you touching your phone.
March 24, 2026 Beginner $50 one-time (Bee Pioneer) + $5-50/month (AI model) 30-60 minutes
Your AI Remembers Everything So You Don't Have To
Text your AI anything worth remembering. A book recommendation, a business idea, a meeting note. It stores everything and builds you a searchable second brain you can query from anywhere.
March 24, 2026 Beginner $5-50/month (depending on model choice) 15-30 minutes
Automate Your Entire Amazon Merch Upload Pipeline
Drop a design into a folder and walk away. Your AI agent removes the background, upscales it, repositions it to Amazon's specs, generates validated keywords, and uploads the listing. From image to live product in minutes.
March 17, 2026 Intermediate $5-20/month (image processing APIs) 4-6 hours (first time teaching the agent)
Research Your Competitors' Ads and Launch Your Own Campaign on Meta
Four AI agents analyze competitor ads from the Meta Ad Library, plan a campaign based on your brand, create all the assets, and publish everything to your Meta Ads account. Full pipeline from research to live campaigns in draft.
March 17, 2026 Intermediate $20-30 per full run (API costs) 2-3 hours
Replace Your CRM With a Conversation
Install one skill and your AI agent becomes your CRM. Contacts, deals, follow-ups, notes. All managed through chat. No dashboards to learn, no data entry, no $50/month subscription.
March 17, 2026 Beginner Free (open source) 15-30 minutes
Run Your AI Assistant 24/7 for $0/Month
Set up an always-on AI agent on Oracle Cloud's free tier. 4 CPU cores, 24GB RAM, 200GB storage. No credit card charges, no trial period, no surprise bills. Ever.
March 17, 2026 Beginner $0/month (forever) 30-45 minutes
Turn Any Windows PC Into a Web Automation Machine
Set up parallel browser automation on a spare PC. Your agent controls 4+ Chrome instances at once, each logged into different accounts. No code, no Selenium, no proxies.
March 15, 2026 Beginner $0 (uses existing hardware) 30-60 minutes
AI Whispers What to Say During Your Cold Calls in Real Time
An AI listens to your live sales calls and gives you real-time coaching on what to say next based on how the conversation is going.
March 9, 2026 Intermediate $20-40/month (transcription + API) 3-5 hours
Your AI Makes Your Coffee, Orders Your Lunch, and Answers Your Phone
Physical world automation is here. One builder connected OpenClaw to an espresso machine, food ordering, and a phone agent that talks to callers and relays to your AI.
March 9, 2026 Intermediate $15-40/month (Vapi + API costs) 4-6 hours
AI Finds Leads, Builds Demo Sites, and Cold Calls Them For You
One agency owner built a full lead gen pipeline: find prospects, research them, build custom demo sites, deploy them, create video walkthroughs, and reach out via text and phone. All automated.
March 9, 2026 Advanced $50-100/month (hosting + API + phone) 1-2 weeks

An OpenClaw agent monitors markets and executes trades autonomously using heartbeats. One builder is running it on a real account right now.

Your team's best ideas are buried in voice messages. This system transcribes them, cross-references with project history, and builds a searchable archive of everything your team has ever discussed.

Build an AI Job Search Agent That Applies While You Sleep
A developer doubled his salary in 3 days by letting his AI agent apply to 100+ jobs. Here's how to build the same system.
March 2, 2026 Intermediate $20-40/month (API + optional tools) 2-3 hours

Give your AI agent $1,000 and a goal. Nat Eliason's bot made $14,718 in 3 weeks. Here's the exact 3-layer memory system and setup.

One solopreneur runs customer support, content, research, and ops with 4 AI agents on a $600 Mac Mini. Here's the architecture.

One user dropped from $90/month to $6 by routing tasks to the right model. Here's the exact setup.

One founder cut $500/month in SaaS fees to zero using a single OpenClaw agent on a Mac Mini. Here's how to replicate it.

Your AI drafts the appeal, cites the right policy sections, and gets a rejected claim overturned. No lawyer needed.

AI Negotiates Sponsorship Deals for You
Your AI handles sponsor outreach, rate card discussions, and deal negotiation via email so you can focus on creating content.

Give your AI full access to your digital life for 5 days. It found $22K in missed tax deductions, built a content pipeline, and sent daily love notes to his wife.
February 23, 2026 Intermediate Free 1 day (setup), 4 days (let it run)
Run Your Business on AI (While Living Your Life)
Jesse Genet runs her company on OpenClaw from a Mac Mini. Amazon orders, printing, procurement, all automated while she homeschools 4 kids.
February 23, 2026 Intermediate $10-50/month (API costs) 1-2 days (gradual)

Your AI handles the back-and-forth with dealerships via email, knows market value, and closes a better deal than you would.

AI Grocery Shopping with a Virtual Credit Card
Your AI orders groceries online using a virtual card, handles substitutions, and keeps your fridge stocked without you lifting a finger.

The Asymmetrix team gave their AI agent full autonomy to create and launch a crypto token. It did everything: branding, smart contract, liquidity, and marketing.

Multiple AI agents coordinating, negotiating, and transacting with each other in a shared environment. The future of automated business operations.

An AI that monitors prediction markets, analyzes events, and executes trades based on your strategy while you focus on your day job.
